title: Tabbing from URL box to search box should NOT highlight the search engine dropdown
content:
1. Enable the search box to the right side of URL box in browser UI.
  2. Open new tab (empty URL box).
  3. Press TAB.
  4. The search engine SELECTOR becomes highlighted, instead of the search INPUT.
  5. Web application software developer is blocked from typing search query right away.
  6. Must press ANOTHER TAB.
  7. This breaks the workflow. It never used to do this, you could type immediately after tabbing ONCE.
  8. Search is disabled in URL box to facilitate local domain resolution/error and NOT trigger fallback searching.

Please revert the behaviour to normal, and make the single TAB operation focus on the search INPUT.

title: I started filing before there were computers, and it was tedious but understandable, but now that I want to try autofill to make it easier, I  get pages of info that are mainly meaningless and incomprehensible to me.o
content:
I spend hours every day on the computer, a 15 or or so year old mac book pro, with a 10.12.6 OS. I use NO social media, but have successfully used Photoshop for some pretty extreme photo editing, for example. I expected that assisted Turbo Tax with auto-fill would be even easier than my having to essentially copy data from T-forms to the correct spaces in CRA TAX forms (with my now somewhat compromised eyesight). But no such luck. I was met with pages and pages of lessons in jargon that didn't even exist when I learned to use computers. I still can't find how to start the auto fill feature that should, in a matter of moments, get the job at hand more than h alf finished for me. HELP!!!

(I'm now going to try to unwind for a couple of hours at the local jazz club, before returning to try to get on with this onerous task.) P/S I have printed out a number of obvious scams that have been attempted at my expense, but can never find anyone who is interested in pursuing these, and perhaps bringing someone to justice.

title: Firefox Mobile Background Refresh
content:
Device: Poco X3 Pro System Information: RAM: 6 GB + 5 GB extended RAM Kernel Version: 4.14.18 OS Version: MIUI 14 14.0.6

Issue Description: When I switch away from Firefox Mobile and return after even 1 second, the currently opened webpage refreshes every time.

Actual Behavior: Every time I leave Firefox briefly and come back, the webpage reloads.

Additional Notes: The phone is capable of keeping heavier apps in background. I am able to run PUBG Mobile and Call of Duty: Mobile at the same time without background issues, but Firefox still reloads tabs aggressively.

Troubleshooting Already Done: 1. Disabled battery optimization for Firefox 2. Enabled Firefox as locked app in recent apps 3. Disabled phantom process killer 4. Reinstalled Firefox
